name: Mozzarella with Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: Fresh Ground Black Pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange mozzarella and tomato slices in alternate overlapping layers on a serving tray.
2. Sprinkle with oregano, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Garnish with anchovies and basil leaves.
4. Serve at room temperature with Neopolitan black olives.
Serves 6.
